text: Being here, I feel an anticipatory curiosity. The empty, modern room behind glass evokes a sense of waiting, as if something important will soon unfold within those walls. Then, entering the vibrant R+D exhibit—where innovation and creative energy radiate—I sense the convergence of ideas and potential. The poetic words and dynamic displays pull me into a reflective mood, stirring gratitude for human inquiry and a desire to contribute to this unfolding dialogue.
